steps.title: Attach the modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase "By reducing the runoff flowing into city sewers" must modify the noun immediately after the comma. The noun after the comma should be the thing doing the reducing: the bioswales. Otherwise, the sentence would illogically suggest that a result or problem performs the action described in the introductory phrase.

steps.title: Reject dangling subjects
steps.content: A makes "the mitigation" seem to reduce runoff. C makes the possessive phrase "the bioswales' mitigation" the subject rather than the bioswales themselves. D makes street flooding and pollution seem to reduce runoff, creating the same dangling-modifier problem. The answer is B.
